functions.description: P4: remove Cribl internals before the Elastic destination. `_time` is Cribl's own epoch bookkeeping field and must not land in _source (Elastic already gets @timestamp). `filter_path` is an ES _bulk *query-string* param (errors,items.*.error,...) that the Elastic destination injects via extraParams; it is NOT a document field and only appears in _source because the winlogbeat route ships raw events with no pipeline. Wire this pipeline (or just this Eval function) onto that route -- see cribl/README.md.
